# Dávid Halmi

> Personal hub for Dávid Halmi: career links, music/audio commissions, hobby music, mixed media art, playlists, socials, and other projects.

## Main Links

- [Career CV links](https://davidhalmi.com/): Career, CV, and LinkedIn links.
- [MusicOnPurpose](https://musiconpurpose.net/): Music and audio commissions.
- [Nagz Space](https://nagz.space/): Hobby music and releases.
- [OkayCoolWowEtc](https://okaycoolwowetc.com/): Mixed media art.

## Optional

- [AFK is silent](https://linktr.ee/afk_is_silent): Short form geography, jingles, and facts content.
- [Spotify playlists](https://open.spotify.com/user/11154427361/playlists): Curated playlists.
